results.title: Brachytherapy.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 3289365. 1988/06/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: PORTEC-2 was a randomised trial for women with high-intermediate 
risk (HIR) endometrial cancer, comparing pelvic external beam radiotherapy 
(EBRT) with vaginal brachytherapy (VBT). We evaluated long-term outcomes 
combined with the results of pathology review and molecular analysis.
METHODS: 427 women with HIR endometrial cancer were randomised between  
to VBT or EBRT. Primary endpoint was vaginal recurrence (VR). Pathology review 
was done in
